bio: Milo had a bit of a difficult time outside. He had bad teeth issues and stopped eating. When he was inside, post-surgery, he adapted so well that we really tried to find him a home (it is quite unusual for an older cat who has lived on the streets so long, to enjoy being inside)! He eventually flew to the UK in August 2023. He is now in his third and final loving home (since March 2024).
